PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT M AND S BODY SHOP INC SAMPLE, JOAN DALE POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: REGARDING LEASE SEE TEXT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $24,828.74 DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,828.74, TOTAL JUDGMENT AMOUNT INCLUDES PRINCIPAL OF $21568.84; ATTY'S FEES: $2,500.00; INTEREST - $531.90; AND COST OF $228.00. EQUIPMENT FAIR MARKET VALUE IS $9,000.00. THE FOLLOWING ARE THE EQUIPMENTS: ONE BLOWTHERM ULTRA CABIN,12 LIGHTS; ETC. -SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
